title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge
tmdbOverview: As rival gangs, corrupt officials and a ruthless Major Iqbal close in, Hamza's mission for his country spirals into a bloody personal war where the line between patriot and monster disappears in the streets of Lyari.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Dhurandhar: The Revenge is a action, crime and thriller film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.5 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
